title: GeeGaw's PVP Pack
description: this is my personal texture pack i use for pvp
body:
GeeGaw’s PVP Pack is built for players who want cleaner, clearer combat. With simplified textures and reduced visual noise, this pack helps you focus on fights, react faster, and keep track of what matters most in PvP—all without straying far from the vanilla aesthetic.

This pack includes the following
- Smaller Shields
- Smaller Gaps
- Outlined Pearls
- Textured Pots
- Better Cobs
- Outlined Ores
- Better HUD/Inventory
- Eating Noises 
- Better Pearls
